properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Our walls are broken down Our gates are burnt with fire And the harp that we once played Now hang upon the willow And can we sing the songs of Zion in a strange land }2x

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I cannot forget Jerusalem I cannot forget Jerusalem I remember the city of God I remember Zion

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: In Isaiah sixty two For Zion sake I will not hold my peace Andfor the sake of Jerusalem I will not rest Until the righteousness go forth as brightness And the salvation thereof As a lamp that burneth

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I cannot forget Jerusalem I cannot forget Jerusalem I remember the city of God I remember Zion

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: When God delivered Zion From the captivity of Babylon Then was our mouth filled with laughter And our tongue with singing The Lord is doing great things for his people That’s why we are glad That’s why we rejoice

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I cannot forget Jerusalem I cannot forget Jerusalem I remember the city of God I remember Zion
